---

# Original Description
```json
{
  "version": 2, 
  "unlock_time": 0, 
  "vin": [ {
      "key": {
        "amount": 0, 
        "key_offsets": [ 22614, 14400, 9778, 19942, 3248
        ], 
        "k_image": "6fcb28dd6fa2cfea12d6de088d42d683f1fa67b1f202f844e6001bf31355de32"
      }
    }
  ], 
  "vout": [ {
      "amount": 0, 
      "target": {
        "key": "938e5543153322bb43c763a24326ce65dfc7a338c0490401e73cc4497b751318"
      }
    }, {
      "amount": 0, 
      "target": {
        "key": "5178025a5db05e9cdae2e523b805dac536eb138d7e9d2d7c2d25a14e90ad802b"
      }
    }
  ], 
  "extra": [ 1, 47, 209, 147, 250, 154, 150, 212, 148, 9, 179, 205, 12, 172, 238, 217, 244, 86, 140, 37, 109, 181, 203, 245, 160, 10, 40, 80, 184, 53, 90, 231, 48
  ], 
  "rct_signatures": {
    "type": 1, 
    "txnFee": 32502752490, 
    "ecdhInfo": [ {
        "mask": "6b5c80ad60d41d55fc71504535f287ca2fe53d7f6ab65e3c1e4d040675469b03", 
        "amount": "f742540010964b895a2eb353b5f76809ccdda91f206e8c37fc2f00656f48a10b"
      }, {
        "mask": "38313877337dd719fd8c598363f2df1a7d477f1b4de2399737a257c136014c0d", 
        "amount": "30eb0a57ebe68e8752d0d2b616b85cf379e8ee93ee3b6037625c5a304ac29303"
      }], 
    "outPk": [ "3909d21b158caabfc53c6156b745f08195b4ee593033b408328ad4ecff9fbcb2", "eadcc727b980b6eed59c888ac829729e93fadff83f84964419835274cfb336df"]
  }, 
  "rctsig_prunable": {
    "rangeSigs": [ {
        "asig": "", 
        "Ci": "_money_in_outputs: parse error - unexpected ','
"
      }, {
        "asig": "", 
        "Ci": ""
      }], 
    "MGs": [ , 
      "ss": [ [ "49f847a842b19ee8c4f806b8be8ab00b962a7a395b087de49ab066e0b98bef09", "6f5b31d03336b3360531b89aea79eb6301e816d5443e7a40ea64d117f7584309", ], [ "4d9b52c1e1f55440f488bfce5178cfcf8baee9558d703e526d26cfa49be2160c""b825a4536b84de3fabb30f45faf3bc43f1c4c21f876b797be3904782e8cf1701"], [ "f5dc5a5c9d372f4124b98b9bc5ab1d82bf3babb5b19b0328e48961b2d9322e07""a84fb94a7bc7f3d35c8488580cf39bff6eac64e7c1136748acc1aaeb6324f80c"], [ "bda3a061a42136fba84a7db94193d9f6d997732e24207028dcf38e9e30a35c05", "18db000c607ed51a7e0a479a4e80e98c8ca4fb541ae64f9cd1726a3147d91706", ], [ "24782b5cd8ddee5dd0b098f9b5549e214e69e1076775036240505c28cccbdb02", "c62b7ee24738680838f07b9ab70757eddaf5086074b16147b15113c087ed5001", ]]"a5dfb050cd85af05943625143598f6b22b5c8d94d4c5b546319b15ec5cc75209"]
  }
}
```

Last part is tottally brokern:

```json
 "MGs": [ , 
      "ss": [ [ "49f847a842b19ee8c4f806b8be8ab00b962a7a395b087de49ab066e0b98bef09", "6f5b31d03336b3360531b89aea79eb6301e816d5443e7a40ea64d117f7584309", ], [ "4d9b52c1e1f55440f488bfce5178cfcf8baee9558d703e526d26cfa49be2160c""b825a4536b84de3fabb30f45faf3bc43f1c4c21f876b797be3904782e8cf1701"], [ "f5dc5a5c9d372f4124b98b9bc5ab1d82bf3babb5b19b0328e48961b2d9322e07""a84fb94a7bc7f3d35c8488580cf39bff6eac64e7c1136748acc1aaeb6324f80c"], [ "bda3a061a42136fba84a7db94193d9f6d997732e24207028dcf38e9e30a35c05", "18db000c607ed51a7e0a479a4e80e98c8ca4fb541ae64f9cd1726a3147d91706", ], [ "24782b5cd8ddee5dd0b098f9b5549e214e69e1076775036240505c28cccbdb02", "c62b7ee24738680838f07b9ab70757eddaf5086074b16147b15113c087ed5001", ]]"a5dfb050cd85af05943625143598f6b22b5c8d94d4c5b546319b15ec5cc75209"]
  }
```

There are unexpected commas, or missing commans, e.g., `, ]]"a5d`

The broken json comes from tx_info.tx_json when getting mempool info. I tested it on testnet. Cant check on mainnet at the moment. 

# Discussion History
## moneromooo-monero | 2016-12-02T13:17:48+00:00
https://github.com/monero-project/monero/pull/1395

## moneroexamples | 2016-12-03T00:47:01+00:00
Thank you!. It works now, and the json generated can be parsed now.
